text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 281 

PRE_ICL_MOPP_COPAY_DAILY 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Copay Split Network Preferred Mail Order — 1 day supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary copay amount for a one-day supply of the drugs on this tier, 
using mail order preferred pharmacy (MOPP; also known as a preferred mail order pharmacy within a 
split network) during the pre-initial coverage limit
